positive: A stylized, high-contrast illustration featuring a celestial fox spirit (kitsune) sitting gracefully amidst flowing cosmic nebula clouds and geometric mandalas. The fox should have long, luminous tails and intricate markings, rendered in clean silhouette style. Use a deep indigo and electric gold color palette accented by vibrant cyan and magenta. The composition should be centered, suitable for a single, impactful apparel print. Art style: Neo-traditional Japanese woodblock print meets modern graphic illustration. Strong backlighting, volumetric light, high contrast, intricate linework, clean vector look.
negative: blurry, text, signature, watermark, logo, low contrast, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, artifacts, grain, photorealistic, 3D render, messy, graffiti
